title: mFRR Energy Activation Market (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] The dataset consolidates prices and volumes from the mFRR Energy Activation Market and provides a comprehensive overview of the different activation types within the market.
The mFRR Energy Activation Market (EAM) dataset is dynamic; therefore, some data may be updated prior to and/or during the MTU as scheduled activations and direct activations occur.
The data provide an indication of the expected dominating direction for the MTU. However, the final calculation of satisfied demand determines the actual dominating direction, which is reflected in the [imbalance price](https://energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/ImbalancePrice) data. (from march 4th, 2026)
 
Data is available from 2025-03-04 13.00.00 CET and onwards.
**Looking for realtime "mFRR Request"?** Find the data on [Realtime Electricity Market Data](https://www.energidataservice.dk/datasets/realtime-electricity-market).
